job.title: Data & BI Consultant / Analyst M/F
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Data & BI Consultant in Chambery, you help our clients unlock the value of their data. You design reporting and analytics solutions to support decision-making.
mission.2: Design and develop BI solutions (Power BI, Tableau, Qlik)
mission.5: Support users in adopting new tools
mission.7: Carry out statistical analyses and studies
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science, statistics, or data science
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in BI / data analytics
profile.3: Proficiency in Power BI, SQL, ETL
profile.4: Knowledge of Python or R is a plus
